metadata.description: Not Rest Inc.'s Claude Code plugin marketplace.

plugins.name: oracle-suite
plugins.description: The working-session toolkit — token-lean, verified, model-agnostic, on any topic. Twenty natural-language-invocable skills from intake to handoff: ORACLE intake with skill routing, researcher / marketresearcher / explainer / decider / factcheck / introspect / game-forge / gpt / chatroom / archivist / spend / stepbystep / actionplan / critic, a director that chains skills into pipelines, a fable-director that runs the '3 devs and a relay' multi-session arrangement, a fable-swarm that runs the fast same-machine delegation arrangement (Fable seat + concurrent in-session Opus lanes), a self-recording sessionend handoff with a live cross-session line, and fable-mode — a verification-first discipline auto-anchored into every session. Real tiered sources, honesty labels, search budgets, self-checks, --quick modes throughout.
